description: You are a software engineer at a digital preservation society. The open-source tool used to extract media assets from 1990s shareware games is failing to parse the classic DOOM1.WAD file correctly. The extractor code is located at /home/ga/workspace/wad_extractor/. Find and fix the bugs across the extraction pipeline so that running 'python main.py DOOM1.WAD output/' completes successfully and extracts the valid assets.
